landed_via_commit_note: Artifacts staged for wukwc were swept into the concurrent sister-bead commit cf33f3ee (flywheel-k8pee) because two workers committed within the same second. Content integrity is unaffected; this receipt is the canonical anchor pointing to the artifacts.
jeff_pattern_finding: Dicklesworthstone repos have ZERO issue-automation GitHub Actions. The agentic ecosystem lives in operator+LLM+commit-message contract: AGENTS.md governs LLM behavior, commits end with (#NNN), bodies cross-reference siblings, Co-Authored-By: Claude trailer is canonical. Proven on ntm#155/commit 0fe72100.

prototype_smoke.result: PASS — clean baseline, prototype dry-run executes cleanly
